mapper.sql: c.id, c.title, c.content, c.type, c.cover_url, c.media_url, c.category_id, c.tags, c.view_count, c.like_count, c.comment_count, c.share_count, c.status, c.creator_id, c.created_time, c.updated_time, u.nickname as creator_name, u.avatar as creator_avatar

ORDER BY
c.view_count c.like_count c.created_time c.popularity_score c.created_time
ASC DESC
c.created_time DESC
mapper.select: SELECT FROM content c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.creator_id = u.id
SELECT FROM content c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.status = 1 AND u.status = 1
SELECT FROM content c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY c.popularity_score DESC, c.view_count DESC, c.like_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM content c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.category_id = #{categoryId} AND c.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM content c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.creator_id = #{creatorId} AND c.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_time DESC

SELECT FROM content c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 AND (c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY c.popularity_score DESC, c.created_time DESC
SELECT FROM content c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 AND c.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%') ORDER BY c.created_time DESC
SELECT FROM content c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND u.status = 1
